target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Visible collapse of upper floors and roof; extensive debris field; structural framing largely intact but significant portions of facade and roof panels destroyed; damage exceeds 45% of visible target element area.

summary: One building assessed with SEVERE DAMAGE, confirmed by visible collapse of upper floors and roof, extensive debris field, and destruction exceeding 45% of visible target area. The scene depicts a street with a single intact vehicle parked before a heavily damaged multi-story building with collapsed sections and scattered rubble. The functional impact is likely severe, with the building rendered uninhabitable and the street obstructed by debris, consistent with the prior assessment.
